'''Galidon Okanor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] art appraiser and fence who lived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. He liked to haggle, but was willing to pay high prices. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] returned to Corellia after the destruction of the ''[[Bria]]'', he sold a [[paledor]] statue and a black [[Krayt dragon pearl/Legends|Krayt dragon pearl]] to Okanor for nearly 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].
